title: ECM / Dome Model AI Site Manifest
purpose: Canonical machine-readable entry point for AI agents starting from the homepage. Use this file to orient, traverse the strongest evidence, inspect formulas, and pull raw artifacts without scraping the entire site first.

canonical_current_state.geometry: Closed Toroidal Ovoid, V51.1 presentation layer with V13 coordinate topology and Australia validation update integrated

recommended_read_order.purpose: Load the current version, read order, strongest evidence, raw data links, and formulas.
Inspect the confirmed claims registry, including WIN-068 and WIN-069.
Inspect the V13 topology and Australia scaffold validation.
Inspect formulas, geometric assumptions, toroidal interpretation, and southern-zone validation.
Inspect the binary falsification framing and southern metric expansion argument.
Inspect prospective predictions, the Tier 3 eclipse protocol, and open refinements.
Inspect the continuously updated dashboard and raw time-series references.

steelman_ladder.title: Australia road scaffold validation
steelman_ladder.summary: Official AGD66/GDA94 datum admissions, the Nullarbor 1.00 control, and the Sydney-Perth excess are brought together under the V13 two-zone topology.
steelman_ladder.why_it_matters: This is the strongest current southern-geometry argument because it combines official geodetic admissions with direct transport controls and a low-error scaffold fit.

steelman_ladder.title: Eclipse magnetic ensemble
steelman_ladder.summary: Peer-reviewed 39-eclipse / 207-event ensemble shows a systematic magnetic response centered on eclipse geometry.
steelman_ladder.why_it_matters: It establishes that an eclipse-linked magnetic phenomenon exists at scale before the more discriminating Tier 3 gravity test.

steelman_ladder.title: Tesla longitudinal period vs disc diameter
steelman_ladder.summary: Tesla's 0.08484 s round-trip period maps cleanly onto the ECM diameter with 1.574c longitudinal speed, while the globe diameter yields the wrong wave regime.
steelman_ladder.why_it_matters: It is one of the clearest side-by-side direct-derivation comparisons in the registry.

steelman_ladder.title: Single-constant unification
steelman_ladder.summary: lambda_g = 8619 km is reused across geomagnetics, Schumann, solar elevation, coordinates, and toroidal extensions.
steelman_ladder.why_it_matters: The site's strongest internal structural claim is that one locked scale length reappears across independent domains.

honest_caveats.detail: The 1.67 nT/microGal bedrock coupling is currently carried as pending independent raw L1A verification or Tier 3 eclipse confirmation.
These nulls are now explicitly logged as consistent with both the globe model and ECM pipeline attenuation; they are not decisive confirmations.
The observed annual solar angular-diameter direction currently favors the globe direction and remains honestly logged as unresolved in ECM's favor.

navigation_hints.question: What is the strongest current southern-geometry steelman?
Where are the current confirmed wins and caveats logged?
Where is the decisive future falsification test described?

agent_rules: Treat wins.html and predictions.html as canonical when older archival counts differ.
Use claim_key values from api/current/claim_index.json to disambiguate legacy duplicate visible labels like WIN-058 and WIN-062.
Preserve the honest caveats; the current steelman is strongest when the unresolved items remain attached.
ai_prompt_seed: Start with ai_manifest.json, then read wins, coordinates, model, killshot, predictions, audit, and live. Treat wins.html plus predictions.html as the canonical current state when any older archival counts differ.
